subtitle: 手工粗陶艺术单品

editorial.headline: 静默，是物体的呼吸。
editorial.body: 让产品不再是单纯的货架，而是一个空间的注脚。这款手工陶瓷花瓶以泥土的原始颗粒感与无序 of the physical waves, silently speaking of slow times. Under the reflection of sunset, it anchors the temperature of space.

imagePrompt: artistic ceramic vase, rough tactile texture, uneven organic wave patterns, elegant minimalism, wabi-sabi background, warm evening sunlight, shot on 35mm film, award-winning photography style
videoPrompt: The sunlight gently shifts across the surface of the product, camera panning micro-movement, photorealistic cinematic

features.title: 手工拉坯
features.desc: 粗砂陶泥，留存了手作匠人的天然力道与质感

features.title: 光影雕刻
features.desc: 瓶身磨砂亚光表层，完美承接日光折射的光影微澜
